name: Irish Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and baking powder.
2. Add the butter, blending until the mixture is butter-colored.
3. Add sugar and continue to mix well.
4. Add half the beaten egg and all the milk.
5. Add sultanas or walnut halves if desired; mix thoroughly to make a sticky dough.
6. Turn the dough onto a floured board and knead for at least 5 minutes, or longer.
7. Cut the dough into rounds and place on a greased baking sheet or hot frying pan.
8. Brush the tops of the scones with the remaining beaten egg.
9. Place walnut halves on top if desired.
10. Bake at 350 to 375 degrees for 15 to 20 minutes, until brown. If preparing over an open fire, heat the frying pan until very hot.
11. Place the scones in the pan and cook for 7 to 8 minutes.
12. Turn and cook for another 7 to 8 minutes more.
Makes 6 scones.
